case_title: JASON DILLEY VS. MAUNG SOE NAING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DILLEY, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT NAING, MAUNG SOE SAFEWAY, INC. AFC CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MAUNG SOE NAING. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AFC, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, NOT PRESENT. NOT SERVED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLEY, JASON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>. SERVED JAN-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NAING, MAUNG SOE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SAFEWAY, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-11-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLEY, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DILLEY, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT AFC CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(JEFFREY SEILER, V.P.)* SERVED JAN-14-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AFC CORP.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DILLEY, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAING, MAUNG SOE AFC CORP. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, CLAIM AGAINST SAFEWAY, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
